travelRadar.title: Memora Travel Radar
travelRadar.desc: Personal monitoring system for travel deals and last-minute tours

wallet.title: Memora Wallet Manager
wallet.desc: Convenient Telegram bot to control and analyze your expenses

about.title: About the product
about.desc: In the rush of everyday life it's easy to lose track of small purchases that quietly turn into financial holes. Tracking expenses should feel as effortless as texting a friend — not like wrestling with spreadsheets and bank statements. We built Wallet to give you back control over your money through the familiar, instant interface of Telegram.

howTo.title: How to Start
howTo.step3: Enter the amount and expense category

bdayBot.title: Memora Bday Bot
bdayBot.desc: Telegram bot for storing birthdays and sending reminders

about.title: Why you need it
about.desc: Forgetting to wish a close friend or coworker a happy birthday is the kind of awkward moment you'd rather avoid. Phone calendars get buried under work notifications. BDay Bot takes the memory of important dates off your plate — gently and unobtrusively reminding you in Telegram, so you always come across as the thoughtful, attentive person you are.

features.title: Features
features.f1: Store all birthdays in one place

howTo.title: How to Start
howTo.step4: The bot will remind you of each celebration
